texto: It is only when women start to organize in large numbers that we become a political force, and begin to move towards the possibility of a truly democratic society in which every human being can be brave, responsible, thinking and diligent in the struggle to live at once freely and unselfishly. Such a democracy would be communism, and is beyond our present imagining.
explicacao: Citação de Sheila Rowbotham sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It is only when women start to organize in large numbers that we become a political force, and be…” articula reflexao, communism, democracy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como democracy e feminism.
